# Maersk Shared JS

Shared JS is a series of common pure javascript functions that help Maersk applications with their basic tasks.

It covers everything from basic brand configuration, initialisation of the global header and footer (IGN) and authentication, to very complicated things like formatting currency values based on the language being used in the system.

All functions are documented here. If there are issues with any code that you see here, please raise an issue.

![Sonar Quality Gate](https://sonar.maerskdev.net/api/project_badges/measure?project=net.apmoller.crb.online.shared-js_master&metric=alert_status) ![Code Test Coverage](https://sonar.maerskdev.net/api/project_badges/measure?project=net.apmoller.crb.online.shared-js_master&metric=coverage)

[See the full Sonar report](https://sonar.maerskdev.net/dashboard?id=net.apmoller.crb.online.shared-js_master)

## Getting started
Shared JS is deployed to Github Packages. If you don't already have access, follow the [Design System developer guide](https://designsystem.maersk.com/get-started/developers/environment-setup/index.html) to set up npm. Then run

```sh
$ npm install @maersk-global/shared-js
```

## Using functions

All functions are available through the ES Module syntax, like this:

```js
import { formatNumber } from "@maersk-global/shared-js"

const theNumber = 42;

console.log(formatNumber(theNumber));
```

### Typescript

As of version 5.3, all functions are fully typed. Please consult the documentation for more details.

## Documentation

All functions and their documentation can be found at [http://maersk-global.github.io/shared-js](http://maersk-global.github.io/shared-js)

## Running tests

The tests are run through Jest, which is configured in the source code. To execute them, run `npm test`
